name: Carol Channing
abstract: Carol Elaine Channing (January 31, 1921 – January 15, 2019) was an American actress, comedian, singer and dancer who starred in Broadway and film musicals. Each of her characters typically possessed a fervent expressiveness and an easily identifiable voice.

concerts.label: The New York Pops Fifth Birthday Gala Celebration
Give My Regards to Broadway – A Salute to 125 Years of Musical Theater

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmie Crawford
about_quotes.evidence: I finally started to playing those Broadway musicals and making records with everybody, records on top of records, Jackie Gleason, Ethel Merman, Carol Channing, Carol Bruce.

about_quotes.speaker: Louie Bellson
about_quotes.evidence: Carol Channing was there. She sat next to me in the front row.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louie Bellson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
